description: You are a wholesale sales representative who needs to create a formal quote in SuiteCRM for 'Meridian Technologies'. Create and save a new Quote with the Title (Subject) 'Q-2024-MER-001', Quote Stage 'Draft', Valid Until '03/31/2025', Payment Terms 'Net 30', and Billing Account 'Meridian Technologies'. Include three line items: 15 'Enterprise Server License' at $2,450.00 each, 8 'Network Switch 48-Port' at $1,875.00 each, and 15 'Annual Support Contract' at $499.00 each.
